attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   
 ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 ,SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT     
 ,SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT      
 ,SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT       
 ,SK_TRX_ID_INT            
 ,AR_TRX_KEY               
 ,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY          
 ,BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY    
 ,GL_DT                    
 ,BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD      
 ,BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD
 ,ACCT_CLASS_CD            
 ,SALES_ORDER_KEY          
 ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     
 ,PRDT_INVOICED_QTY        
 ,REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD       
 ,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  
 ,BK_COMPANY_CD            
 ,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY         
 ,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT   
 ,CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE        
 ,GL_POSTED_DT             
 ,PRODUCT_KEY              
 ,BK_DEAL_ID               
 ,MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD
 ,TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD   
 ,SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
 ,ELEMENT_TYPE_CD          
 ,BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT    
 ,BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY
 ,TRX_SRC_CD               
 ,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 ,ATTRIBUTION_CD           
 ,BK_WEB_ORDER_ID          
 ,SS_CD                    
 ,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD       
 ,RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT  
 ,RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT 
 ,RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT  
 ,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT 
 ,BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
 ,COALESCE (BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD
 ,COALESCE(BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT, -999) AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
 ,COALESCE (BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT,-999)BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT      
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM           
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER          
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM       
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
 ,REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME   
 ,'N' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 ,POB_TYPE_CD
 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT        
 ,TRX_CLASS_CD                  
 ,SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           
 ,SUBSCRIPTION_CD               
 ,BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM       
 ,RESIDUAL_TRX_TYPE_CD 
 ,SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY
 ,END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY
 ,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY 
 ,RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME
 ,'I' AS ACTION_CODE   
 ,DML_TYPE
 FROM (
 SELECT
 SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
 COALESCE (DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID, -999)  AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 COALESCE (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID , -999 )SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT,
 COALESCE( DIST.AE_LINE_NUM,  -999)  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT,
 COALESCE( DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 -7777 AS AR_TRX_KEY,
 -7777  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 -999  BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY ,
 COALESCE (XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
 COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
 COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
 COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
 --COALESCE ( NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY , -7777) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY , 
-6666 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 -6666 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
 -999 AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY, 
 COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,  
 COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
 COALESCE (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD,
 COALESCE (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 -999  AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT, 
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN 
 'DEBIT'  ELSE  'UNKNOWN'END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
 COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,
 COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,  -999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11 AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_DEAL_ID, 
 'UNKNOWN' AS  MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD, 
 'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD ,
 -999 AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT, 
 COALESCE (DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN' ) ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, 
 COALESCE (DIST.APPLICATION_ID, -999) AS  BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(NECAL_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_SRC_CD,   
 -999 AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
 CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE' 
 WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN   'ATTRIBUTED' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END   AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15 AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID ,
 'CG' AS SS_CD,
 CASE WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5='FORWARD' THEN CAST('Revenue Residuals Forward' AS VARCHAR(50))
      WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5='REVERSAL' THEN CAST('Revenue Residuals Reverse' AS VARCHAR(50))
	  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS  RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS  BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
 NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,  
 NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
 NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
 'UNKNOWN' AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
 'N' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD,
 CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NOT NULL THEN SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ELSE EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 EXT_ALL.RULE_END_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 EXT_ALL.TRX_CLASS AS TRX_CLASS_CD,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9 AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10 AS SUBSCRIPTION_CD,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12 AS BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5 AS  RESIDUAL_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(NECAL_END.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(NCA_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY, 
 COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME,
 CASE WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
 FROM      
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL   DIST 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL 
 ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_SWSS SUB_ALL
 ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 AND  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=DIST.TRANSACTION_ID  -- NEED TO CHECK COL NAME : SUB_SKU_ID/ATTRIBUTE2
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_SWSS EXT_ALL
 ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_SWSS  XAH
 ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
 AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON(COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,EXT_ALL.SKU)=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
 ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
 AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOVT
 ON TRIM(NSOVT.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID) = EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA
 ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID
 AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  NECAL_BILL
 ON (NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 AS INTEGER)) 
 /* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
 ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL_BILL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY) */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
 ON (NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE22 AS INTEGER))
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END
 ON (NECAL_END.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE23 AS INTEGER))
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL_SOLD
    ON (NECAL_SOLD.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE24 AS INTEGER))
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA_SOLD
    ON (NCA_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY 
 
 UNION ALL
SELECT
 SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
 COALESCE (DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID, -999)  AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 COALESCE (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID , -999 )SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT,
 COALESCE( DIST.AE_LINE_NUM,  -999)  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT,
 COALESCE( DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 -7777 AS AR_TRX_KEY,
 -7777  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 -999  BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY ,
 COALESCE (XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
 COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
 COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
 COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
 --COALESCE ( NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY , -7777) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY , 
-6666 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 -6666 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 -999 AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,  
 COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD, 
 COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
 COALESCE (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD,
 COALESCE (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 -999  AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,  
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN 
 'DEBIT'  ELSE  'UNKNOWN'END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
 COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,
 COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,  -999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11 AS VARCHAR(50)) AS BK_DEAL_ID, 
 'UNKNOWN' AS  MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD, 
 'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD ,
 -999 AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT, 
 COALESCE (DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN' ) ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, 
 COALESCE (DIST.APPLICATION_ID, -999) AS  BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(NECAL_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(DIST.ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_SRC_CD,  
 -999 AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
 CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE' 
 WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN   'ATTRIBUTED' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END   AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD, /* CAN GO WITH Attribute29:OA Flag COL TOO*/
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15 AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID ,
 'CG' AS SS_CD,
 CASE WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5='FORWARD' THEN CAST('Revenue Residuals Forward' AS VARCHAR(50))
      WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5='REVERSAL' THEN CAST('Revenue Residuals Reverse' AS VARCHAR(50))
	  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS  RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS  BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
 NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,  
 NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
 NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
 'UNKNOWN' AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
 'N' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD,
 CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NOT NULL THEN SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ELSE EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 EXT_ALL.RULE_END_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 EXT_ALL.TRX_CLASS AS TRX_CLASS_CD,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9 AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10 AS SUBSCRIPTION_CD,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12 AS BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5 AS  RESIDUAL_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(NECAL_END.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
 COALESCE(NCA_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY, 
 COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CREDIT_TYPE_PROGRAM_NAME,
 CASE WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
 FROM      
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_SWSS   DIST 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL 
 ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_SWSS SUB_ALL
 ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 AND  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=DIST.TRANSACTION_ID  -- NEED TO CHECK COL NAME : SUB_SKU_ID/ATTRIBUTE2
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_SWSS EXT_ALL
 ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_SWSS  XAH
 ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
 AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON(COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,EXT_ALL.SKU)=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
 ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
 AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOVT
 ON TRIM(NSOVT.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID) = EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA
 ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID
 AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE  NECAL_BILL
 ON (NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 AS INTEGER)) 
 /* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
 ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL_BILL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY) */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
 ON (NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE22 AS INTEGER))
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END
 ON (NECAL_END.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE23 AS INTEGER))
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL_SOLD
    ON (NECAL_SOLD.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = CAST(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE24 AS INTEGER))

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA_SOLD
    ON (NCA_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY 
 ) A

SELECT 
 TRANSACTION_DIST_ID     
  ,APPLICATION_NAME        
  ,APPLICATION_ID          
  ,LEDGER_ID               
  ,ORG_ID                  
  ,EVENT_ID                
  ,EVENT_TYPE              
  ,EVENT_STATUS            
  ,AE_HEADER_ID            
  ,AE_LINE_NUM             
  ,TRANSACTION_ID          
  ,TRX_NUMBER              
  ,TRX_LINE_ID             
  ,PARTY_ID                
  ,PARTY_SITE_ID           
  ,PERIOD_YEAR             
  ,PERIOD_NUM              
  ,AMOUNT                  
  ,GL_DATE                 
  ,EXCHANGE_RATE           
  ,EXCHANGE_DATE           
  ,CURRENCY_CODE           
  ,CONVERSION_TYPE         
  ,ACCOUNT_CLASS           
  ,HEADER_ID               
  ,ORDER_NUMBER            
  ,ORDER_LINE_ID           
  ,QUANTITY_INVOICED       
  ,DIST_TYPE               
  ,ELEMENT_TYPE            
  ,SEQUENCE_NUMBER         
  ,CCID                    
  ,SEGMENT1                
  ,SEGMENT2                
  ,SEGMENT3                
  ,SEGMENT4                
  ,SEGMENT5                
  ,SEGMENT6                
  ,SEGMENT7                
  ,SEGMENT8                
  ,SEGMENT9                
  ,SEGMENT10               
  ,DIST_BAL_TYPE           
  ,SOURCE_TABLE_NAME       
  ,JE_CATEGORY_NAME        
  ,JE_SOURCE_NAME          
  ,GL_POSTED_DATE          
  ,SOURCE_BATCH_NAME       
  ,SOURCE_BATCH_ID         
  ,DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME  
  ,DESTINATION_BATCH_ID    
  ,ERROR_MESSAGE           
  ,ERROR_FLAG              
  ,ERROR_CODE              
  ,CREATION_DATE           
  ,CREATED_BY              
  ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE        
  ,LAST_UPDATED_BY         
  ,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN       
  ,REQUEST_ID              
  ,PROG_APPL_ID            
  ,PROG_ID                 
  ,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE     
  ,ATTRIBUTE1              
  ,ATTRIBUTE2              
  ,ATTRIBUTE3              
  ,ATTRIBUTE4              
  ,ATTRIBUTE5              
  ,ATTRIBUTE6              
  ,ATTRIBUTE7              
  ,ATTRIBUTE8              
  ,ATTRIBUTE9              
  ,ATTRIBUTE10             
  ,ATTRIBUTE11             
  ,ATTRIBUTE12             
  ,ATTRIBUTE13             
  ,ATTRIBUTE14             
  ,ATTRIBUTE15             
  ,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT    
 ,PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID         
  ,ATTRIBUTE16             
  ,ATTRIBUTE17             
  ,ATTRIBUTE18             
  ,ATTRIBUTE19             
  ,ATTRIBUTE20             
  ,ATTRIBUTE21             
  ,ATTRIBUTE22             
  ,ATTRIBUTE23             
  ,ATTRIBUTE24             
  ,ATTRIBUTE25             
  ,ATTRIBUTE26             
  ,ATTRIBUTE27             
  ,ATTRIBUTE28             
  ,ATTRIBUTE29             
  ,ATTRIBUTE30             
  ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE31        
  ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE32        
  ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE33        
  ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE34        
  ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE35        
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE36         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE37         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE38         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE39         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE40         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE41         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE42         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE43         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE44         
  ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE45       
 ,TRAIL_FILE_NAME
 ,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
 ,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
 ,REFRESH_DATETIME
 ,PROCESSED_FLAG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL   DIST 
  WHERE DIST .APPLICATION_ID IN
  (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) 
  IN ('CISCO RESIDUAL ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')
  AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$WORKDB.W_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI W_ROL
         WHERE DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID=W_ROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT )
